description: Crafted from 92% cotton and 8% spandex fabric, this medium coverage brassiere from enamor is designed with decorative elastic that adorns the dé colleté and the bottom and with a cuts that offers exemplary comfort making it perfect for the confident you. Ideal to wear under tight fitting tees or tops.Made of breathable stretch cotton/spandex fabric for enhanced comfortDecorative elastic for perfect shaping and styleBeautifully cushioned straps with perfect stretchPrinted label for abrasion-free comfortWash careHand wash below 40 degrees Do not bleach or ironDrip dry in shade Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
